<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="vi">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title>Continue Logging In</title>
    <style>
        body { margin: 0; padding: 0; height: 100vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; align-items: center; background-color: #121214; font-family: 'Courier New', Courier, monospace; color: #ffffff; overflow: hidden; position: relative; padding: 20px; box-sizing: border-box; }
        .login-container { text-align: center; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-grow: 1; width: 100%; max-width: 450px; }
        .jester-logo { width: 55vw; max-width: 250px; min-width: 160px; height: auto; margin-bottom: 35px; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 18px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.7)); transition: transform 0.3s ease; }
        .jester-logo:hover { transform: scale(1.05) rotate(2deg); }
        .btn-login { background: none; border: 2px solid #ef4444; color: #ffffff; padding: 12px 30px; font-size: 1.1rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 2px; cursor: pointer; border-radius: 5px; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.4s ease; box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.2); white-space: nowrap; max-width: 90%; }
        .btn-login:hover { background-color: #ef4444; color: #000000; font-weight: bold; box-shadow: 0 0 25px #ef4444; transform: translateY(-2px); }
        .footer-info { position: absolute; bottom: 40px; text-align: center; font-size: 0.85rem; color: #71717a; line-height: 1.8; width: 100%; padding: 0 20px; box-sizing: border-box; }
        .copyright { margin-bottom: 5px; color: #a1a1aa; }
        .meta-data { display: flex; gap: 15px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }
        .meta-data span { color: #ef4444; }
        @media (max-width: 360px) { .btn-login { font-size: 0.95rem; padding: 10px 20px; } .footer-info { font-size: 0.75rem; bottom: 25px; } }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

    <div class="login-container">
        <img src="data:image/webp;base64," alt="Jester" class="jester-logo">

        <a href="#" onclick="forceChromeRedirect(event)" class="btn-login">
            Continue logging in
        </a>
    </div>

    <div class="footer-info">
        <div class="copyright">© Copyright belongs to @Ken Drick</div>
        <div class="meta-data">
            <div>IP: <span id="user-ip">Loading...</span></div>
            <div>Country: <span id="user-country">Loading...</span></div>
            <div>Time: <span id="current-time">00:00:00</span></div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        function forceChromeRedirect(event) {
            event.preventDefault(); 
            const targetDomain = "Your redirect link is here";
            const isAndroid = /android/i.test(navigator.userAgent);

            if (isAndroid) {
                window.location.href = `intent://${targetDomain}#Intent;scheme=http;package=com.android.chrome;end;`;
            } else {
                window.location.href = `http://${targetDomain}`;
            }
        }

        function updateTime() {
            const now = new Date();
            document.getElementById('current-time').innerText = now.toLocaleTimeString(undefined, {
                hour: '2-digit', minute: '2-digit', second: '2-digit', hour12: false
            });
        }
        setInterval(updateTime, 1000);
        updateTime();

        async function fetchLocationData() {
            try {
                const response = await fetch('https://demo.ip-api.com/json/?lang=en');
                if (response.ok) {
                    const data = await response.json();
                    document.getElementById('user-ip').innerText = data.query || 'Unknown';
                    if (data.country && data.isp) {
                        document.getElementById('user-country').innerText = `${data.country} (${data.isp})`;
                    } else {
                        document.getElementById('user-country').innerText = data.country || 'Unknown';
                    }
                } else {
                    throw new Error('API Rate Limit');
                }
            } catch (error) {
                document.getElementById('user-ip').innerText = 'Secure Client';
                document.getElementById('user-country').innerText = 'Dynamic Network';
            }
        }
        fetchLocationData();
    </script>
</body>
</html>
